subject: a massive stone golem assembled from gravestones and tomb fragments, lumbering through a candlelit cemetery
description: A hulking golem dominates the center of the image, its body visibly constructed from broken gravestones, tomb slabs, and carved stone pieces. Cross-shaped and arch-shaped stone fragments are incorporated into its form — one large cross marker is embedded in its upper torso/head area. The creature's limbs are mismatched blocks of dark stone. The setting is an arched stone crypt or cemetery chapel, dark and mist-filled. Lit candles in the lower left foreground cast warm points of light against the otherwise cold grey-green palette. A circular moon or pale light source glows through an arched opening behind the creature. The mood is horror and grim animation.
foreground: candles on gravestones in the lower left
background: arched stone crypt with pale circular light source
